message:
feat(mvcc): gate OS-specific deps for wasm32 compatibility (bd-17nh5)

Replace direct parking_lot and std::time::Instant imports in fsqlite-mvcc
with platform-agnostic polyfills from fsqlite_types::sync_primitives.

Changes across 13 source files:
- parking_lot::Mutex → fsqlite_types::sync_primitives::Mutex
- parking_lot::RwLock → fsqlite_types::sync_primitives::RwLock
- parking_lot::{Mutex, RwLock} → sync_primitives::{Mutex, RwLock}
- Inline parking_lot::Mutex::new() → sync_primitives::Mutex::new()
  (seqlock.rs, left_right.rs)
- std::time::Instant → sync_primitives::Instant
  (rcu.rs, flat_combining.rs, compat.rs, gc.rs, observability.rs)
- Move nix and parking_lot to cfg(not(wasm32)) target deps
- Remove hard fsqlite-types "native" feature requirement

Verification:
- 1016 mvcc lib tests pass (8 pre-existing failures unchanged)
- Native workspace compilation clean

Also closes bd-34eut (VFS gating) — fsqlite-vfs already gates
unix/uring/windows modules behind cfg(feature = "native"), compiles
for wasm32 with --no-default-features.

Also closes bd-11o4u (tracing polyfill) — tracing crate compiles
for wasm32 natively; console.log subscriber is a Phase 2 concern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
